name: ARCHIVE
role_short: Archive zone for old, inactive, or legacy materials that should not stay in active root.
allowed_writes_short: Owner-approved archival moves; Archive manifests and rollback notes
forbidden_writes_short: Active task outputs without task routing; Secrets without redaction
artifact_policy: Keep archive evidence pointers in ARTIFACTS by TASK_ID when relevant.
notes: No delete policy applies.

name: ARTIFACTS
role_short: Primary evidence root for task outputs, proofs, manifests, and final bundles by TASK_ID.
allowed_writes_short: Files under E:\IMPERIUM\ARTIFACTS\<TASK_ID>\...; Index updates by task scope
forbidden_writes_short: Raw secrets; Untracked random files; Root-level dumps
artifact_policy: All proofs and bundles must be registered by TASK_ID.
notes: Artifacts are evidence surfaces, not canonical authority.

name: OBSERVED
role_short: Read-only historical and observed contour copies for reference analysis.
allowed_writes_short: Only owner-approved observed imports; Read-only mapping notes
forbidden_writes_short: Mutation of observed copies; Task output bundles
artifact_policy: Use ARTIFACTS for proof of analysis performed on observed copies.
notes: No deep mutation from root mapping tasks.

name: PC_ENGINEERING_ROOM
role_short: Active engineering headquarters for architecture, reviews, labs, maps, and decision preparation.
allowed_writes_short: Engineering docs, maps, and lab outputs
forbidden_writes_short: THRONE writes; Untracked root-level task outputs
artifact_policy: Any task result proof should also be stored under ARTIFACTS\<TASK_ID>\.
notes: Engineering room is not admission authority.

name: SSH_COMMAND_LIBRARY
role_short: Library of SSH route knowledge, diagnostics, tools, and tested recipes.
allowed_writes_short: Route docs and helper scripts; Diagnostics receipts
forbidden_writes_short: Private key contents; Raw credentials; Unrelated task bundles
artifact_policy: Route usage evidence must be copied or pointed from ARTIFACTS by TASK_ID.
notes: No secrets in route docs.
